headline: PlayStation 5 Fully Stocked For The Holidays, Aims For Record Sales, Says Sony Executive
summary: Sony Group Corp's (NYSE: SONY) PlayStation 5 is set to achieve its ambitious sales target of 25 million units for the year, overcoming past supply chain disruptions.

headline: If You Invested $1,000 In Microsoft At Its IPO, Here's How Much You'd Have Now
summary: A soaring price for Microsoft's stock price helped make many employees of the technology company millionaires. Investors who got in early could have had the same fortune.
